title: 風塵みたいなあたしでも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after attaining her goal of entering
the Classics, Mejiro Ryan is faced with burnout
from her constant efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike Ryan, Ines Fujin has entered the world of
racing from a life where she had very little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She lets Ryan know that her motivation for racing
stems from a genuine desire to run for the sake of
her family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her own motivation rekindled by this talk,
Ryan is now ready to enter the Japanese Derby.
